description_long: This is a rectangular black briefcase with a hard shell exterior and a hinged lid that opens to reveal neatly stacked bundles of U.S. currency. The interior is organized with rows of money, each bundle secured with a paper band, filling the entire base of the case. The briefcase features a central, robust handle for carrying, and two metallic latches on the front for secure closure. The exterior is smooth and matte, with no visible logos or external pockets. The corners are sharp and unreinforced, and the overall design is sleek and utilitarian. The case is designed to be portable and secure, suitable for transporting valuables in an urban environment.
description: A sleek black hard-shell briefcase filled with neatly stacked bundles of U.S. currency, featuring a central handle and metallic latches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open briefcase with rows of money bundles and both latches and handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the briefcase, the open lid, and the arrangement of currency inside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid back of the briefcase with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open lid, handle, and the organized stacks of money from a different angle.
attribute_handle_type: Single central handle, rectangular and rigid, likely made of plastic or coated metal, fixed to the case with metal brackets, non-retractable and non-flexible.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two front-facing metal latches, likely snap or clasp type, positioned symmetrically on either side of the handle.
